name: eriq
description: Emotional Resonance Intelligence Quotient — diagnostic tool for brand/campaign emotional impact

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=client --workspace=server --if-present
scripts.build:shared: cd shared && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build:shared && cd client && npm run build
